subject: Read ambiguous test files and decide placement
description: Read Z:/_dev-ssd/thesis-manifold/utility_scripts/tests/test_agent_system_comprehensive.py and Z:/_dev-ssd/thesis-manifold/utility_scripts/scripts/test_group.py in full. Determine what system/component each actually tests: if test_agent_system_comprehensive.py tests the old pre-integration thesis_agents/ code (now archived as .archive/thesis_agents_preintegration/), it should move to .archive/ alongside it rather than remain in active utility_scripts/tests/. If test_group.py tests something still live in the tooling (Zotero/GDrive/NotebookLM helpers), it stays in utility_scripts/scripts/. Record the decision and rationale as a new row under the Open Items table in task_plan.md and in findings.md. No code changes in this task -- investigation and plan-doc update only.
